title: invoice — settings
description: Tenant-facing invoice configuration + per-user preferences for report subscriptions. The invoices table is NOT settings — this file declares tenant-level defaults (numbering series, dunning cadence overrides, notification routing) + per-user preferences (aging report subscription).

groups.label: Invoicing
groups.description: Tenant-wide defaults for invoice numbering, delivery, and dunning.

fields.name: default_series
fields.label: Default series prefix
fields.helpText: Invoice numbers start with this prefix. Small tenants locked to 'INV'; Medium+ may set to 'SO', 'RECEIPT', or a custom 3-8 char slug.

fields.name: per_year_reset
fields.label: Reset counter on Jan 1st
fields.helpText: true = counter resets each year (2026-000001 → 2027-000001). false = monotonic across years. Change requires ops review — mid-year change can create numbering ambiguity.

sections.label: Delivery
sections.description: How invoices are delivered to customers.

fields.name: auto_send_on_finalize
fields.label: Auto-send email on finalize
fields.helpText: true = SendInvoiceEmailJob dispatches automatically on finalize. false = admin manually invokes POST /invoices/{invoice}/send.

fields.name: email_bcc
fields.label: BCC on every invoice email
fields.helpText: Typically your finance-team email(s). Applied to every outbound invoice email.

fields.name: tracking_pixel_enabled
fields.label: Include tracking pixel
fields.helpText: true = fire InvoiceViewed when the customer opens the email. false = disable (some tenants prefer for privacy).

fields.name: cadence
fields.label: Reminder cadence (days past due)
fields.helpText: Enterprise-only — customize the default day+3/7/14/30/60 schedule.

fields.name: pause_on_customer_action
fields.label: Pause dunning when customer responds
fields.helpText: true = pause when customer opens payment link or contacts support. false = dunning continues regardless.

fields.name: collections_agency
fields.label: Collections agency slug
fields.helpText: Must be a pre-configured licensed agency in the notifications module.

options.tenant-branded: Tenant branded (logo + colors from branding module)

sections.label: Notification routing
sections.description: Where invoice-related admin notifications are delivered.

fields.name: uncollectible_notify_users
fields.label: Notify these users on uncollectible invoices
fields.helpText: Every user listed receives InvoiceUncollectibleNotification. Tenant owners always notified regardless.

fields.name: write_off_notify_users
fields.label: Notify these users on written-off quarterly digest

groups.label: My invoicing preferences
groups.description: Per-user preferences for invoice reports + alerts.

fields.name: receive_monthly_revenue_report
fields.label: Send me the monthly revenue report

fields.name: receive_quarterly_write_off_digest
fields.label: Send me the quarterly write-off digest

fields.name: receive_uncollectible_alerts
fields.label: Notify me on invoices marked uncollectible
fields.helpText: This preference only takes effect if the tenant admin listed you in uncollectible_notify_users. Owners always receive.

fields.name: receive_reconcile_drift_alerts
fields.label: Notify me on payment reconciliation drift (ops only)
